countries_of_focus: Bolivia; Colombia; Ecuador; Peru; Brazil; Argentina; Uruguay; Paraguay; Venezuela; Chile; Guyana; Suriname; EU member states
brief_justification: This is a conceptual and comparative-qualitative paper that proposes measurement criteria for the institutionalization of regional integration blocs. It applies these criteria descriptively to four integration processes (CAN, MERCOSUR, UNASUR, EU) without any statistical or quantitative empirical analysis. There is no regression, no causal inference design, no survey data, and no hypothesis testing. The paper is a framework-building exercise in comparative regionalism.
